project_type: Full-stack app: FastAPI (Python) backend + Next.js 15 (TypeScript) frontend
build_system: pnpm for frontend, pip for backend
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm build in frontend to verify TypeScript compiles. 2. Run pnpm lint for linting. 3. Verify no import errors or type mismatches.
setup_instructions: Frontend: cd frontend && pnpm install. Backend: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET. Commit but do NOT push.
contribution_requirements: Do not break existing polling fallback. Do not break chat WebSocket functionality. Nudges must still be suppressed during Pomodoro (focus state).
key_patterns: Backend: ConnectionManager in ws_manager.py uses send_to_user(user_id, dict) to push JSON. proactive_delivery.py already supports push=True mode with type 'notification'. Frontend: useChatSocket.ts uses WebSocketClient class from lib/ws.ts with IncomingMessage type union. useNotificationSocket.ts is a separate WebSocket for notifications. ProactiveListener.tsx polls /api/proactive/check every 3 min and uses addNotification from AIContextProvider.
directory_structure: backend/app/ contains FastAPI app with agents/, scheduler/, api/, db/ dirs. frontend/ is Next.js 15 app with components/, hooks/, lib/ dirs.
